docs.title: ACCESS Notification Catalog
docs.text: Welcome to the ACCESS Notification Catalog — an auto-generated reference of all automated notifications sent from ConnectCI portals.

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: This catalog is automatically generated from the ConnectCI Drupal application and deployed to GitHub Pages. Each section documents the notifications sent by a specific portal or service area.

docs.title: Sections
docs.text:
• ACCESS Support — Notifications from the ACCESS Support portal
  • Campus Champions — Notifications from the Campus Champions portal
  • CCMNet — Notifications from the CCMNet portal
  • Open OnDemand — Notifications from the Open OnDemand portal
  • PAScience — Notifications from the PAScience portal
  • Shared — Notifications shared across multiple portals

Use the navigation above to browse notifications by portal.

Body Your engagement [node:title] is ready to recruit. Edit Location config: content_moderation_notifications.content_moderation_notification.engagement_accepted.yml Is Shared no Needs Review no

docs.title: waitlist
docs.text: Field Value Portals access-support Trigger user action / system event Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient varies Recipient Role any Subject Waitlist Status for {{ title }} Body Dear {{ name }},Thank you for registering for {{ title_link|raw }} on {{ start_date }}. At this time, the session is full, and your registration has been placed on the waitlist.If a spot becomes available, we will notify you immediately. {{ contact }}Thank you for your understanding, and we hope to accommodate you soon!Kind regards,ACCESS Support Edit Location config: symfony_mailer.mailer_policy.access_misc.waitlist.yml Is Shared no Needs Review no

docs.title: ccmnet_new_user
docs.text: Field Value Portals ccmnet Trigger user action / system event Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient varies Recipient Role any Subject A new CCMNet participant has joined! Body A new participant has joined CCMNet! {{ title }}. Edit Location config: symfony_mailer.mailer_policy.ccmnet.ccmnet_new_user.yml Is Shared no Needs Review no

docs.title: ccmnet_welcome
docs.text: Field Value Portals ccmnet Trigger user action / system event Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient varies Recipient Role any Subject Welcome to CCMNet (Cyberinfrastructure Community-Wide Mentorship Network) Body Welcome to CCMNet (Cyberinfrastructure Community-Wide Mentorship Network)We are excited to have you join our network of mentors and mentees committed to learning, growing, and supporting each other. Whether you are a seasoned professional looking to share your knowledge and expertise or a mentee seeking guidance and mentorship, you are now part of a supportive community dedicated to personal and professional development.As part of this program, we would like to gather your profile information (persona) to match a mentor or mentee and to benefit from your community participation. Please look at your persona and use the Edit Persona button to update skills, and add a bio, and photo.You will be added to the CCMNet Affinity Group. Members of the CCMnet Affinity Group will receive periodic email notifications about mentorship opportunities and other news.Thank you for being so committed to supporting each other and contributing to a culture of learning and growth. We look forward to seeing your positive impact and the connections you forge within the community.If you have any questions, ideas, or suggestions for how we can enhance the mentorship community experience, please don't hesitate to contact our project team. Your feedback is always welcome and appreciated.Once again, welcome to the Cyberinfrastructure Community-Wide Mentorship Network!Best regards,CCMNet Project team Edit Location config: symfony_mailer.mailer_policy.ccmnet.ccmnet_welcome.yml Is Shared no Needs Review no

docs.title: cron_author_update

Edit Location config: symfony_mailer.mailer_policy.ccmnet.cron_author_update.yml Is Shared no Needs Review no

docs.title: PA Science DMZ Notifications
docs.text: Name Trigger Send Method Subject Recipient Needs Review project_approved_pascience user action / system event email Project Approved and Published: {{ project_title }} varies no project_created_pascience user action / system event email New Project Submission: {{ project_title }} varies no project_flagged user action / system event email {{ title }} - interest shown on project varies no project_received_pascience user action / system event email Project Submission Received: {{ project_title }} varies no project_updated_pascience user action / system event email Project Updated: {{ project_title }} varies no access_misc_project user action / system event email varies no

docs.title: project_approved_pascience
docs.text: Field Value Portals pascience Trigger user action / system event Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient varies Recipient Role any Subject Project Approved and Published: {{ project_title }} Body Dear {{ submitted_by }}, Great news! Your project has been approved and is now published on the PA Science DMZ portal. Project Details: Title: {{ project_title }} Project Leader: {{ project_leader_first }} {{ project_leader_last }} Approved on: {{ approved_date }} Current Status: {{ status }} Your project is now visible on the Projects page and will appear in the project carousel. Depending on your project status, researchers and students may be able to express interest in joining your project. View your published project: {{ public_url }} Manage your project submission: {{ edit_url }} Next Steps: Keep your project information updated as it progresses Update milestones and deliverables as they are completed Change the project status as needed (Recruiting, In Progress, etc.) You can edit your project at any time using the management link above. Congratulations and best of luck with your project! Best regards, PA Science DMZ Team This is an automated message from the ConnectCI Portal. Edit Location config: symfony_mailer.mailer_policy.access_misc_project.project_approved_pascience.yml Is Shared no Needs Review no

docs.title: project_created_pascience
docs.text: Field Value Portals pascience Trigger user action / system event Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient varies Recipient Role any Subject New Project Submission: {{ project_title }} Body Hello, A new project has been submitted to PA Science DMZ and requires your review. Project Details: Title: {{ project_title }} Project Leader: {{ project_leader_first }} {{ project_leader_last }} Contact Email: {{ contact_email|raw }} Submitted by: {{ submitted_by }} on {{ created_date }} Project Description: {{ project_description }} Next Steps: To review and mark this project as "Received", please visit: {{ edit_url }} For questions, please contact {{ submitted_by }} or the project leader at {{ contact_email|raw }}. This is an automated message from the ConnectCI Portal. Edit Location config: symfony_mailer.mailer_policy.access_misc_project.project_created_pascience.yml Is Shared no Needs Review no

docs.title: project_flagged
docs.text: Field Value Portals pascience Trigger user action / system event Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient varies Recipient Role any Subject {{ title }} - interest shown on project Body {{ flagged_name }} is interested in the project {{ title }} Edit Location config: symfony_mailer.mailer_policy.access_misc_project.project_flagged.yml Is Shared no Needs Review no

docs.title: project_received_pascience
docs.text: Field Value Portals pascience Trigger user action / system event Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient varies Recipient Role any Subject Project Submission Received: {{ project_title }} Body Dear {{ submitted_by }}, Thank you for submitting your project to PA Science DMZ. Project: {{ project_title }} Submitted on: {{ created_date }} Reference ID: {{ submission_id }} What happens next? Please complete the additional project information fields and check the "Notify PA Science DMZ Program Managers of this update" box when you're ready for our team to review your submission—you will receive another notification once your project has been approved and published. You can view or edit your project submission at any time: {{ edit_url }} If you have any questions or need to make changes, please contact us or edit your submission directly. Thank you for your participation in the PA Science DMZ program! Best regards, PA Science DMZ Team This is an automated message from the ConnectCI Portal. Edit Location config: symfony_mailer.mailer_policy.access_misc_project.project_received_pascience.yml Is Shared no Needs Review no

docs.title: project_updated_pascience
docs.text: Field Value Portals pascience Trigger user action / system event Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient varies Recipient Role any Subject Project Updated: {{ project_title }} Body Hello, A project submission has been updated and may require your attention. Project Details: Title: {{ project_title }} Project Leader: {{ project_leader_first }} {{ project_leader_last }} Contact Email: {{ contact_email|raw }} Submitted by: {{ submitted_by }} Last updated: {{ updated_date }} Current Status: {{ status }} Received: {{ received }} Approved: {{ approved }} To review this updated project submission, please visit: {{ edit_url }} This is an automated message from the ConnectCI Portal. Edit Location config: symfony_mailer.mailer_policy.access_misc_project.project_updated_pascience.yml Is Shared no Needs Review no

docs.title: Shared Notifications
docs.text: This page catalogs all automated notifications that apply to multiple portals (MATCH Engagement workflow).

docs.title: Summary Table
docs.text: Name Trigger Method Subject Recipient Needs Review MATCH Engagement Draft content moderation transition (create_new_draft) email MATCH Engagement draft created MATCH PM — MATCH Engagement Received content moderation transition (save_as_submitted) email Your MATCH Engagement was received Submitting author — MATCH Engagement Accepted (disabled) content moderation transition (start_recruiting_and_notify_author_) email Your MATCH Engagement is ready to recruit! Submitting author — MATCH Engagement Review Requested (disabled) content moderation transition (request_review) email MATCH Engagement submitted for review MATCH PM — MATCH Engagement Final Review (disabled) content moderation transition (finished_adding_information) email MATCH Engagement ready for review MATCH SC —

docs.title: MATCH Engagement Draft
docs.text: Field Value Portal(s) shared Trigger Content moderation transition: create_new_draft in match_engagement workflow Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient MATCH program managers Recipient Role match_pm Subject MATCH Engagement draft created Body Summary Notifies the MATCH PM that a new engagement draft has been created; includes a link to review and edit the draft. Edit Location web/sites/default/config/default/content_moderation_notifications.content_moderation_notification.engagement_draft.yml

docs.title: MATCH Engagement Received
docs.text: Field Value Portal(s) shared Trigger Content moderation transition: save_as_submitted in match_engagement workflow Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient Submitting author Recipient Role any (author flag) Subject Your MATCH Engagement was received Body Summary Confirms to the submitting user that their MATCH engagement request has been received and the team will be in touch soon. Includes a link to the canonical source domain. Edit Location web/sites/default/config/default/content_moderation_notifications.content_moderation_notification.engagement_received.yml

docs.title: MATCH Engagement Accepted (disabled)
docs.text:
Note: This notification is currently disabled (status: false).

Field Value Portal(s) shared Trigger Content moderation transition: start_recruiting_and_notify_author_ in match_engagement workflow Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient Submitting author Recipient Role any (author flag) Subject Your MATCH Engagement is ready to recruit! Body Summary Would notify the engagement author that their engagement has been accepted and is now ready to recruit participants, with an edit link. Currently disabled. Edit Location web/sites/default/config/default/content_moderation_notifications.content_moderation_notification.engagement_accepted.yml

docs.title: MATCH Engagement Review Requested (disabled)
docs.text:
Note: This notification is currently disabled (status: false).

Field Value Portal(s) shared Trigger Content moderation transition: request_review in match_engagement workflow Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient MATCH program managers Recipient Role match_pm Subject MATCH Engagement submitted for review Body Summary Would notify the MATCH PM to review a specific engagement submission, with a link to the edit form. Currently disabled. Edit Location web/sites/default/config/default/content_moderation_notifications.content_moderation_notification.engagement_review_requested.yml

docs.title: MATCH Engagement Final Review (disabled)
docs.text:
Note: This notification is currently disabled (status: false).

Field Value Portal(s) shared Trigger Content moderation transition: finished_adding_information in match_engagement workflow Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient MATCH steering committee Recipient Role match_sc Subject MATCH Engagement ready for review Body Summary Would notify the MATCH steering committee that an engagement is ready for final review, with a link to the edit form. Currently disabled. Edit Location web/sites/default/config/default/content_moderation_notifications.content_moderation_notification.final_review.yml
